subcodes.title: Words spoken in Feb. 1918
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, that the dark ages have passed away and the century of light has come.... The past age was an age of wondrous achievements... Glad Tidings! Glad Tidings! That the Sun of Reality hath shone forth! Glad Tidings! Glad Tidings!
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @promotion of commerce and industry, @unity; oneness of humanity, @supreme tribunal
